creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Here comes the current maintainer :)

(In reply to VVD from comment #2)

Thanks for making the patch.
Since this is mostly a GUI front end, the next few updates are also needed at the same time.
This is a quote:
Port                                            | Current version | New version
------------------------------------------------+-----------------+------------
audio/libopenshot-audio                         | 0.2.2           | v0.3.0
------------------------------------------------+-----------------+------------
multimedia/libopenshot                          | 0.2.7           | v0.3.0
------------------------------------------------+-----------------+------------
multimedia/openshot                             | 2.6.1           | v3.0.0
------------------------------------------------+-----------------+------------

So, please wait a moment.
